name: Dasi Hospital Manager
author: Poki
description: Become the manager of your very own hospital in Dasi Hospital Manager! In this management simulation game, you're in charge of a small hospital. Patients are left at the front door by the ambulance and you'll have to provide them with the right care. As you progress, you can create new wards to help out different types of patients. You can also unlock an ambulance to head out into the city and safe people in the city! Can you build the best hospital ever? How to play Dasi Hospital Manager? Use the arrow keys or WASD to walk through your hospital, build new items and help your patients. Who created Dasi Hospital Manager? Dasi Hospital Manager was created by Dasi Games. Check out their other games on Poki: Office Manager ! How can I play Dasi Hospital Manager for free? You can play Dasi Hospital Manager for free on Poki. Can I play Dasi Hospital Manager on mobile devices and desktop? Dasi Hospital Manager can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
